register.choose_type: Filifili le ituaiga o le lesitala
register.address_desc: Lo'u fale, ofisa, nu'u — fua e leai se totogi ma vave mo tagata uma
register.poi_desc: Faailoga, faatoaga pasi, maketi — ma ata (manaomia le iloiloga a le pule)
register.hotel_desc: Faletalimalo, fale mo tagata mai, malologa — mo taga pisinisi (iloiloga tuusao)
register.photo_guide: 1+ taitasi: fafo, faitotoa, potu, faleuila, mea aoga
register.address_notice: Lesitala vave · Sailia i le lalolagi atoa
register.poi_notice: Lolomiina pe a mae le iloiloga a le pule (aso 1-3)
register.hotel_notice: O faamatalaga o le totogi o le a auina mai i le imeli pe a mae le iloiloga (aso 3-5 o galuega)
register.hotel_pricing_1: Tulaga masani: $99/tausaga — Lisi saili + tuatusi WIA Pin Code
register.hotel_pricing_2: Premium: $299/tausaga — Lisi muamua + itulau auiliili + tusi
register.hotel_pricing_note: Faamatalaga o le totogi auina pe a mae le iloiloga
register.footer_notice: Nofoaga lesitala e mafai ona sailia e tagata faaaoga WIA GIL i le lalolagi atoa

register.transport_panel_note: Nofoaga o pasi, nofoaga, uafu · Faʻasalalau pe a uma le iloiloina

guide.address_case1: Lo'u fale — E mafai e le delivery ma le ambulance ona maua oe saʻo lava
guide.address_case2: Ofisa/Faleoloa — E mafai e tagata faatau ona maua oe faigofie
guide.address_case3: Aoga/Falemaʻi — Faʻasoa le tulaga saʻo i taimi o faalavelave
guide.address_case4: Vaipuna/Maketi o le nuʻu — Faailoa nofoaga taua o le nuʻu
guide.address_case5: Fale ie o le tolauapiga — Avatua fesoasoani e saʻo
guide.address_tip: Fautuaga: Tusi le igoa o le nofoaga i lau gagana ina ia mafai e tuaoi ona maua faigofie
guide.poi_case1: Faailoga — Malumalu, tuugamau, paka, nofoaga vaavaai
guide.poi_case2: Faatoaga pasi — Nofoaga saʻo ma faamatalaga o le ala
guide.poi_case3: Maketi/Faleoloa — Maketi faalelei, faleoloa mea faʻamanatu
guide.poi_case4: Auaunaga lautele — Ofisa meli, malo, ofisa suesue
guide.poi_notice: Ata e manaomia. Lolomiina pe a mae le iloiloga a le pule.

ai_modal.title: WPC AI Fesoasoani
ai_modal.question: Fesili
ai_modal.location_tip: Fa'aoga lenei code e maua ai lenei nofoaga i soifuaga o le lalolagi!
ai_modal.location_denied: E manaomia le iloina sa nofoaga. Fa'atagaina le ala i le nofoaga.
ai_modal.location_unsupported: O lenei upumeamata e le fa'alagoa ai le faiga'i nofoaga.
ai_modal.service_not_ready: O lenei faiga'i AI e le'i faatalamatuina.
ai_modal.distance_tip: Fautuaina mo le mafaufau: Eseesega o uniga 3 × 200 ≈ mamao (km)
ai_modal.reverse_desc: Sailia le 9-digit Pin Code e suia ai i GPS!
ai_modal.help_register: Mo fa'amatala AI matua, faʻarehistara le API key!
ai_modal.tool_summarize:
Fa'apu'upu'u le anotusi o lenei itulau upega tafa'ilagi i fuaiupu e 3-5:

{text}
ai_modal.tool_translate:
Fa'aliliu le anotusi o lo'o i lalo nei i le gagana Samoa:

{text}
ai_modal.tool_question: Tu'u mai fa'amaumauga GPS e liliu i le WIA Pin Code!
ai_modal.tool_keywords:
Su'e mai upu autu e 10 mai mea o lo'o i lalo nei ma fa'amatalaina pu'upu'u ta'itasi:

{text}
ai_modal.tool_explain: E mafai ona ou fa'amatala le WIA Pin Code, le YUJIN Transform, ma le fuaina o mamao. Fesili mai ia te a'u!
ai_modal.tool_chat: Talatalanoa saoloto! Fesili mai ia te a'u e uiga i le WIA Pin Code.

space.earth_orbit: O le Afa o le Pulu
space.enter_solar: 🪐 Ulufale i le Sistemu o le La →

little_prince.q1: O le taimi e te va'ai ai i le fetu, e te manatu i le fetu e musuia ai oe, e foliga mai o fetu uma e musuia.
little_prince.q2: E fiafia tagata matua i numera. A e talanoa i se uo fou, e le fa'ailoa le mea e taua.
little_prince.q3: O le matagofie o le toafa e i ai se vai i se nofoaga e le iloa.
little_prince.q4: O le mea e sili ona taua e le mafai ona va'aia.
little_prince.q5: O le taimi na e leiloa mo lau rosemari, o le taimi lea na fa'amanuiaina ai lau rosemari.
little_prince.q6: O fetu e fa'ailoa i tagata eseese. O se ta'iala mo tagata o lo'o fa'ata'ita'iga.
little_prince.q7: O le fa'atauina o se fa'avae e fa'avae i luga o le fa'amaoni.
little_prince.q8: E le tele tagata matua e manatu i le taimi na avea ai i latou ma tamaiti.
little_prince.q9: O le na'o i latou o tamaiti e iloa le mea o lo'o latou sailia.
little_prince.q10: E le mafai e tagata ona saili i le mea moni i le taimi e le mafai ai.

sky_explorer.title: Sky Explorer
sky_explorer.subtitle: Feiloaʻi i le lalolagi ma suʻesuʻe lau iloa
sky_explorer.game_modes_sub: 12 auala e su'esu'e ai le lalolagi mai lau cockpit
sky_explorer.geoflight_desc: Faʻasologa vave — iloa taulaga, atunuu, laumua, ma kontinenti. Leaflet minimap + cockpit HUD + faiga vaʻalele.
sky_explorer.city_intel_desc: Aʻoaʻo i faʻamatalaga taulaga — vaʻalele, ofisa, tupe, visa — ona tali lea i suesuega o le memória.
sky_explorer.photo_master_desc: Vaʻai i se ata taulaga mai Wikipedia — fa'ailoa le taulaga. Faʻaoga fesoasoani i se tau.
sky_explorer.space_explorer_desc: O le malaga i le faiga o le soifuaga. Aʻoaʻo e uiga i planeti, masina, ma faataitaiga cosmic.
sky_explorer.daily_challenge_desc: O se taulaga, 10 fesili. Taumafa fou i le aso. Fa'asoa lau taunu'uga!
sky_explorer.travel_challenge_desc: Fa'ata'ita'iga otel 3-lai. Fa'ailoa taulaga mai ata otel, fa'ata'ita'iga tau, fa'ailoga nofoaga i le mapa.
sky_explorer.data_powered: Fa'atekinolosi Fa'avae i luga o Fa'amaoniga
sky_explorer.data_powered_sub: O fesili uma e fa'avae i luga o fa'amaoniga i le lalolagi
sky_explorer.already_played: Ua Taʻaloga I le Aso Nei
sky_explorer.come_back: Toe foʻi i le aso e te maua ai se ta'amilosaga fou!
sky_explorer.which_country: O le a le atunuu e {city} i ai?
sky_explorer.which_continent: O le a le kontinenti e {city} i ai?
sky_explorer.which_capital: O le a le laumua o {country}?
sky_explorer.which_flag: O le a le atunuu e fa'avae i le fu'a?
sky_explorer.live_sky_desc: Quiz on real flights in the air right now. Identify destinations, origins, aircraft types from live ADS-B data.
sky_explorer.live_ocean_desc: Quiz on real vessels sailing the seas right now. Identify destinations, vessel types, and oceans from live AIS data.
sky_explorer.intel_time_hint: How long to memorize intel data?
sky_explorer.estimated_rate: Tau e fa'ata'atia i le po?
sky_explorer.no_scores: E leai ni fa'ailoga. Ta'a'iga i se faiga e va'ai i au ta'aloga sili!
sky_explorer.currency_master_desc: Fa'ata'ita'iga i lau iloa o le 166 o fa'atau i le lalolagi ma tau fa'atekinolosi i le taimi tonu.
sky_explorer.currency_symbol: O le a le fa'atau e fa'aaoga ai lenei fa'ailoga?
sky_explorer.exchange_quiz: E fia le tau o ia?
sky_explorer.rate_compare: O le a le tau e sili atu?
sky_explorer.country_from_currency: O le a le atunu'u e fa'aaoga ai lenei fa'atau?
sky_explorer.landmark_master_desc: Fa'ailoa fa'ailoga lauiloa mai le 10,000+ nofoaga i le lalolagi.
sky_explorer.which_landmark: O le a le fa'ailoga i {city}?
sky_explorer.landmark_type_q: O le a le ituaiga fa'ailoga?
sky_explorer.landmark_country: O le a le atunu'u e i ai lenei fa'ailoga?
sky_explorer.world_wonders_desc: Mauga lauiloa, auala i lalo o le sami, ma nofoaga ta'avale i le lalolagi.
sky_explorer.tunnel_connects: O le a le atunu'u e feso'ota'i?
sky_explorer.antipode_explorer_desc: O le a le mea i le itu i le isi o le lalolagi? E feagai le geografia ma le matimatika.
sky_explorer.through_earth: I totonu o le lalolagi: 12,742 km
